title: zanthoxylum heitzii
intro: Zanthoxylum heitzii, also known as the 'Sarawak Pepper Tree', is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to Borneo. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum heitzii include its ability to relieve pain, reduce fever, and aid in digestion, as well as its potential to protect against cancer and neurodegenerative diseases. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
